text: Trump’s grip on the party threatens his grasp of Congress - Politico

text: WHO chief concerned over 'scale and speed' of Ebola outbreak - NPR
fullText: The World Health Organization top official has expressed concern over the rapid spread of a rare type of Ebola in Congo. Authorities have reported at least 134 suspected deaths and over 500 cases.

text: American passenger on hantavirus-hit cruise feels 'blindsided,' 'misled' by new quarantine orders - KSL.com

text: Target is set to report first-quarter earnings, offer read on consumer - CNBC

text: School board member who hugged teen and called her ‘hot’ is charged with assault - NBC News

text: As Putin visits China, distrust simmers beneath an anti-U.S. alliance - The Washington Post

text: How Ken Paxton courted Donald Trump and won his endorsement - CNN

text: Trump administration sues Minnesota to block prediction markets ban - Star Tribune

text: Kendra Duggar Distances Herself from Family Amid Legal Troubles with Joseph Duggar - Yahoo
